lesson.menu_desc: Sharing past travel experiences with the past simple -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 16 -- Talking About Your Trip: Sharing Past Travel Experiences
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Roberto Pires | Aula 16 -- Talking About Your Trip

listenings.text: Welcome to our short travel review of the week. Many visitors shared their stories with us, and they were wonderful. One traveler said his journey was long but the scenery on the road was amazing. Another visitor walked along the beach at sunset and called it the highlight of her whole trip. A young couple explored the old town all day. They were exhausted at night, but they had a memorable time. Most people agreed on one thing. They relaxed, they tried new food, and they made unforgettable memories. We hope your trip was just as special.

Last month I took an amazing trip, and I still think about it every day. I arrived on a Monday, and the journey was long, but the scenery was beautiful. On the first day I explored the old streets and I walked for hours. I was exhausted at night, but I was happy. One evening I sat on the beach and watched the sunset. That was the highlight of the whole trip. I relaxed, I ate wonderful food, and I talked to friendly people. It was a memorable, unforgettable week, and I want to go back soon.

extra_audio.text: First, Roberto arrived in the city after a long journey. Then he explored the old town and walked for hours. Next, he relaxed on the beach and watched a beautiful sunset. After that, he tried wonderful local food at a small restaurant. Finally, he called the whole trip amazing, memorable, and unforgettable.
